checklist.test_strategy_covers_e2e: N/A (feature modifies agent prompt files, not executable code; relay-and-resume integration is already tested by existing e2e suite)
checklist.test_strategy_covers_security: N/A (no new user inputs, no new file system operations, no credentials, no APIs; rationale documented in test-strategy.md)
checklist.test_strategy_covers_performance: N/A (summary generation is LLM-dependent; caching instructions verified structurally via TC-07.1)

tdd_state.description: 26 tests pass against existing content; 19 fail awaiting Phase 06 implementation

details.article_II: 45 prompt content verification tests designed before implementation (Phase 05 precedes Phase 06). Tests use node:test (project standard). 26 pass against existing content, 19 fail awaiting new confirmation sequence instructions. Coverage target: 100% of all 8 FRs and 28 ACs.
details.article_VII: Traceability matrix maps all 8 FRs and 28 ACs to test cases. Every AC has at least one covering test. No orphan tests. 100% requirement coverage verified via test-traceability-matrix.csv.
details.article_IX: All 5 required artifacts produced: test-strategy.md, test-cases.md, test-traceability-matrix.csv, test-data-plan.md, and the executable test file. All GATE-05 checklist items pass.
details.article_XI: Cross-file consistency tests (TG-09) verify integration between roundtable-analyst.md and isdlc.md: relay-and-resume compatibility (TC-09.1), meta.json field preservation (TC-08.3), no new hooks (TC-09.2), no new deps (TC-09.3). Domain-to-persona mapping (TC-09.5) validates component interaction contracts.

notes: Sequential confirmation sequence at analysis step boundaries. 45 prompt content verification tests across 10 test groups covering the confirmation state machine, domain summaries (requirements/architecture/design), amendment flow, tier-based scoping, summary persistence, and meta.json acceptance state. Tests follow the established project pattern (readFileSync + assert). TDD state: 26 pass / 19 fail -- failing tests target new content to be added in Phase 06. No new hooks, no new dependencies, no new executable code. Feature is entirely prompt instruction changes to 2 markdown files.
